title: Mobile Engineering Manager - Spend
description:
About the Spend Squad:

We build products that allow our customers to spend their money anywhere in the world. We currently process about £26 billion annually and issue cards to over 40 countries. We are also building out features which localise the spending experience no matter where you are.

As the lead of the mobile team you would be responsible for shipping the direct customer touch points on one of Wise's most impactful products.

What's in it for you

  • The opportunity to lead the new mobile team in one of Wise's most influential and recognisable products. The mobile requirements of the squad have been growing dramatically recently and this is the chance to influence the product that is used by millions of customers.
  • The chance to shape and determine how our mobile engineers work within our Spend product for both iOS and Android
  • A collaborative, no-blame culture built on transparency, ownership, and trust.
  • The autonomy to build and scale the team how you see fit, and to grow and incubate new products within the squad.
  • The ability to grow and shape the careers of our talented and eager mobile team.

What the team is doing

  • The mobile engineers are currently embedded in our various product teams. We would like to bring them together in a new team led by you to optimise our mobile engineering resources, and facilitate the growth and development of our team.
  • The engineers currently support 5 individual product teams within our squad and do very close work with the wider teams / squads / tribes within Wise.
  • The engineering team will support the card product across all stages, card order, transacting, 3ds, bill split, recurring payments, dispute resolution and much more.

Qualifications

  • Proven experience leading and mentoring one or multiple high-performing engineering teams.
  • A strong product mindset and passion for customer experience, you prioritise work with the customers in mind and make data-driven decisions to fix customer pain-points
  • Strong technical skills in either iOS or Android development.
  • Great communication skills and the ability to articulate complex, technical concepts to non-technical audience
  • You are able to pivot effectively when priorities change, quickly re-prioritizing and adjusting workflows to meet objectives, and you are impactful when doing work in the weeds with the teams.
  • You are comfortable working in a globally distributed squad and tribe, and driving projects across multiple teams and disciplines.
  • You are not just a people manager, you’re a technical and product passionate contributor who can grow teams, individuals,initiatives and empower our ICs to expand their industry presence
  • Ideally you’ve grown a team from incubation to high performance state before.

postedCompany.description:
Who we are

Wise is a global technology company, building the best way to move money around the world. With the Wise account people and businesses can hold over 40 currencies, move money between countries and spend money abroad. Large companies and banks use Wise technology too; an entirely new cross-border payments network that will one day power money without borders for everyone, everywhere. However you use the platform, Wise is on a mission to make your life easier and save you money.

Co-founded by Kristo Käärmann and Taavet Hinrikus, Wise launched in 2011 under its original name TransferWise. It is one of the world’s fastest growing, profitable technology companies and is listed on the London Stock Exchange under the ticker, WISE.

16 million people and businesses use Wise. In fiscal year 2023, Wise processed approximately £105 billion in cross-border transactions, saving customers around £1.5 billion.

What it’s really like to work here

At Wise, we do things a bit differently. There’s no corporate nonsense, and no old-fashioned hierarchy. Instead, we work in dozens of self-sufficient, autonomous teams. Think of them like start-ups within a start-up that learn from each other.

Each team picks the problems they want to solve. So there’s no micro-management. No hiding behind fancy job titles. And no one telling you what to do. You are your own boss. But you’ll get tons of guidance and plenty of support from talented, super-smart colleagues from all over Wise.

We’re going to be upfront — the way we work doesn’t suit everyone. But if freedom, autonomy, and life-affirming, head-scratching professional challenges rock your world, we could be a match made in heaven.
postedCompany.name: WISE ASIA-PACIFIC PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D15 Katong, Joo Chiat, Amber Road
